title: Tenses Through Festivals — Levels 1 & 2 Combo Pack
tagline: A complete, gift-ready journey through English tenses and Indian festivals.
description: The Combo Pack brings together both progressive levels, helping children move from recognising basic tense changes to using more complex verbs and sentence structures. Familiar festival contexts keep grammar meaningful and memorable.
benefits: Covers past, present and future tenses across two levels
Supports progressive sentence building and grammar practice
Combines English learning with Indian cultural awareness

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: All themes from Levels 1 and 2, including Indian festivals, action words, sentence formation, irregular verbs, rituals and traditions.
